steps.title: Identify the requested difference
steps.content: The notes say both sculptures are large metal works by Daniel Serra. The difference is material: Through is made of forged steel, while TTI London is made of weathering steel.

steps.title: Choose the material contrast
steps.content: Choice A describes only Through. Choice B describes only TTI London. Choice D emphasizes a similarity, not a difference. The best sentence directly contrasts the kinds of steel used in the two sculptures. The answer is C.
